scripts.package:chrome: pnpm build && mkdir -p release && rm -f "release/linkedin-feed-blocker-${npm_package_version}.zip" && cd dist && zip -qr "../release/linkedin-feed-blocker-${npm_package_version}.zip" .
scripts.e2e:real:setup: pnpm run typecheck:e2e && pnpm exec playwright test -c playwright.real.config.ts --grep @setup --headed
scripts.e2e:real: pnpm run typecheck:e2e && pnpm build && RUN_REAL_LINKEDIN_E2E=1 pnpm exec playwright test -c playwright.real.config.ts --grep-invert @setup --headed
scripts.manual:linkedin: pnpm run typecheck:e2e && pnpm build && pnpm exec playwright test -c playwright.manual.config.ts --headed
